source_text: If no common cryptographic parameters can be negotiated, the server MUST abort the handshake with an appropriate alert.
rule_statement: If no common cryptographic parameters can be negotiated, the server MUST abort the handshake with an appropriate alert.
applies_when: Server cannot find common parameters with client after HRR
checkability_rationale: Can send ClientHello with no acceptable parameters and verify abort.
ambiguity_notes: Alert type not specified; handshake_failure is the appropriate alert per §6.2 descriptions.
